name: Courtyard of Villafranca Castle
description: Nocturnal concerts held by candlelight in an unparalleled historical setting.
long_description: The Castle-Palace of the Marquises of Villafranca is an imposing 16th-century fortress crowned by the iconic slate spires typical of Bierzo architecture. This living monument, which throughout history was the home and inspiration of the famous master Cristóbal Halffter, opens the doors of its stately courtyard exclusively for this occasion, offering a corner full of mysticism and centuries of history that can rarely be enjoyed in intimacy.

For this space, the concerts will have a nocturnal character at 21:30 h and will take place under the evocative atmosphere of candlelight. The flickering of hundreds of flames will illuminate the stone walls of the central courtyard, enveloping the audience in an intimate experience with a capacity strictly limited to 300 seats. As the seats are not numbered, they will be occupied strictly on a first-come, first-served basis on the day of the event, ensuring that the acoustics and the historic environment merge in an unforgettable way.
address: Calle del Castillo, s/n, 24500 Villafranca del Bierzo (León)
